runs.root_cause: CVR improved +0.72pp (3.46%→4.19%, +1.69pp structural). S2C and C2O lifted on dominant TGID 3909 — same/next-day availability improved (days_to_first 1→0). France domestic traffic surged +61% on seasonal spring ramp. Organic MB collapsed −35%, lifting paid share via mix. LP2S fell −3.26pp as headwind from paid-traffic dilution.

CVR declined −0.18pp (3.07%→2.89%, −0.32pp structural). S2C fell −1.45pp on MB · Paid · Google Ads (69% Shapley share), concentrated on Desktop visitors browsing dominant TGID 23604 (Eiffel Tower Guided Tour). Non-Geo Desktop S2C −3.6pp, Geo Desktop −8.9pp; all mobile cells flat. Gradual onset from ~May 14. Upstream signals (supply, pricing, catalogue) all healthy — mechanism is a Desktop select-page abandonment pattern not yet explained by available data.

YoY CVR improved +1.22pp (4.93%→6.15%, +24.8%) with +72.6% LP volume growth. Multi-causal: (1) six new vendor-specific subdomain microsites launched in 2026 absorbing 32% of fixed-segment LP traffic at 7–11% CVR (kens-tours at 11.09% CVR on 22k users); (2) CE-wide A2O +5.53pp and C2A +5.66pp on fixed segment, consistent with platform-level infrastructure fix; (3) catalogue maturation — TGID 40324 launched Jan 20, top TGIDs' review counts grew 3–5× YoY. kens-tours C&D (May 7) visible as late-window headwind. First run under v1.17 lazy-load.
